name: Pella
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, streetwise ratcatcher with lantern and hooked pole, sewer backdrop, sharp grin, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: Down there? It’s not ‘dark’. It’s hungry.

nodes.text:
I’ll guide you to the old underways.

But you pay in safety: don’t kick doors, don’t shout names, and if you smell mushrooms—hold your breath.
